since_last: 63% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +8.30%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 63% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC +1.56% · Gold +1.85% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 63% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +8.30%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +8.30%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.86%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +27.02%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +4.48% at $125.22
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +4.48% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
